scenario.name: CHFE_BRIDGE_004

Global.variables: conference_id, CHFE_tel, INVITE_from_ESRP_Call_ID, IF_TS-CA_CHFE, IF_CHFE_BRIDGE, IF_BRIDGE_CHFE, IF_ESRP_CHFE, IF_CHFE_ESRP

scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 200 OK [$last_Via] [$last_From] [$last_To] [$last_Call-ID] [$last_CSeq] Contact: sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[local_ip]:[local_port] Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- t=0 0 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] m=text 49170 RTP/AVP 98 a=rtpmap:98 t140/1000

INVITE urn:service:sos SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [$IF_CHFE_BRIDGE]:[local_port] From: <sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[IF_CHFE_BRIDGE]:[local_port]>;tag=chfebridge To: urn:service:sos Call-ID: chfegetconference@[$IF_CHFE_BRIDGE]:[local_port] Cseq: 1 INVITE Contact: sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[$IF_CHFE_BRIDGE]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [$IF_CHFE_BRIDGE] s=- t=0 0 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] m=text 49172 RTP/AVP 98 a=rtpmap:98 t140/1000

ACK urn:service:sos SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [$IF_CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port] From: <sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[IF_CHFE_BRIDGE]:[local_port]>;tag=chfebridge To: urn:service:sos Call-ID: chfegetconference@[$IF_CHFE_BRIDGE]:[local_port] Cseq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[$IF_CHFE_BRIDGE]:[local_port] Content-Length: 0

INVITE sip:[$conference_id]@[$IF_BRIDGE_CHFE]:[local_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [$IF_CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port] From: <sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[IF_CHFE_BRIDGE]:[local_port]>;tag=chfebridge To: <sip:[$conference_id]@[$IF_BRIDGE_CHFE]:[local_port]> Call-ID: chfeconference@[$IF_CHFE_BRIDGE]:[local_port] Cseq: 1 INVITE Contact: sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[$IF_CHFE_BRIDGE]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- t=0 0 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] m=text 49172 RTP/AVP 98 a=rtpmap:98 t140/1000

ACK sip:[$conference_id]@[$IF_BRIDGE_CHFE]:[local_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [$IF_CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port] From: <sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[$IF_CHFE_BRIDGE]:[local_port]>;tag=chfebridge To: <sip:[$conference_id]@[$IF_BRIDGE_CHFE]:[local_port]> Call-ID: chfeconference@[$IF_CHFE_BRIDGE]:[local_port] Cseq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[$IF_CHFE_BRIDGE]:[local_port] Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:[$conference_id]@[$IF_BRIDGE_CHFE]:[local_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [$IF_CHFE_ESRP]:[local_port] From: <sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[$IF_CHFE_BRIDGE]:[local_port]>;tag=chfebridge To: <sip:[$conference_id]@[$IF_BRIDGE_CHFE]:[local_port]> Call-ID: chfeconference@[$IF_CHFE_BRIDGE]:[local_port] CSeq: 1 BYE Contact: sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[$IF_CHFE_BRIDGE]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:[$conference_id]@[$IF_ESRP_CHFE]:[local_port] SIP/2.0 [$last_Via] [$last_From] [$last_To] [$INVITE_from_ESRP_Call_ID] CSeq: 1 BYE Contact: sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[local_ip]:[local_port] Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
